{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":12},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6866622906337165324","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书挺好看的，不走寻常套路，女主所携带的系统，除了提供钱（而且女主花钱的地方感觉也不是很多）以外，其他作用并没有凸显出来。我觉得作者还可以写一下女主穿越来之前的故事，然后把女主的身份在交代清楚就更好了，期待作者继续加油努力哦。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1598760239,"group_id":"6839157610768239619","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"多更点多更点，宝贝们催催更，我更爱了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3renvma6Y2cCQilEKOXyVkbitJdWEvKwteXK5QbmQmg","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b65be431cf1e4f5785912bc76030daca~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622333&x-signature=O7S2nMRaDMbE7BKdH527Ej2l8gc%3D","user_id":"2581303836803134","user_name":"元夕意然"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2581303836803134","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6839157610768239619","book_info":{"abstract":"如果给你一个穿越的机会，你最想要什么金手指？
